query:
UPDATE guests SET
            name = COALESCE($2, name),
            phone = CASE WHEN $3 THEN $4 ELSE phone END,
            email = CASE WHEN $5 THEN $6 ELSE email END,
            plus_ones = COALESCE($7, plus_ones),
            dietary = COALESCE($8, dietary),
            notes = COALESCE($9, notes),
            updated_at = now()
        WHERE id = $1
